422.description: TOTP factor is blocked or not enabled.
TOTP factor is blocked or not enabled.

post.description:
Search for factors using structured filters in the request body.

**Supported filters** (combined with AND logic):
- **identifier**: Search by account identifier substring (case-insensitive LIKE)
- **channelId**: Filter by channel UUID (must be valid UUID format)
- **enabled**: Filter by enabled status (boolean: true/false)
- **locked**: Filter by locked status (boolean: true/false). Includes locked_auto when applicable.

**Validation rules**:
- Unknown filter keys are rejected with 400
- Null or blank filter values are treated as not provided
- channelId must be valid UUID format
- String filters (identifier) have max length of 64 characters

Factors with status DELETED are always excluded from results.

requestBody.description: Search request with filters and pagination

SearchExample.summary: Search TOTP factors by identifier and enabled status

400.description: The search filter parameters are invalid.

FactorSearchRequest.description: Request payload for structured factor search with pagination and sorting

filters.description:
Filter criteria as key-value pairs.
Supported keys: identifier, channelId, enabled, locked.
channelId must be valid UUID format.
Null or blank values are treated as not provided - omit the key for the same effect.

FilterErrorDetail.description: Details about a specific filter validation error

field.description: The filter field that failed validation

reason.description: The reason for the validation failure

rejectedValue.description: The value that was rejected (may be null for security reasons)

SearchFilterErrorResponse.description: Error response for invalid search filter requests

errors.description: List of validation errors with details

sendTo.description: Destination to send the OTP QR code (email or phone)

accountId.description: Account identifier for this enrollment session

seed.description: Base32 seed used to configure authenticator app

stepTime.description: OTP step time configured by policy in seconds

temporal.description: Indicates this enrollment is temporary and not yet persisted

password.description: User's password. If the password field is not completed, a temporary password will be generated, as long as this feature is enabled.

expirationInDays.description: Number of days until the password expires. If not provided, the configured default value will be used.

birthDate.description: Date of birth used to verify whether the password complies with this policy, if enabled.

phoneNumber.description: Phone numbers used to verify whether the password complies with this policy, if enabled.

temporal.description: Indicates whether the password being created is temporal or permanent. Default is false (permanent).

sendTo.description: Email address or phone to send the password to.

birthDate.description: Date of birth used to verify whether the password complies with this policy, if enabled.

phoneNumber.description: Phone numbers used to verify whether the password complies with this policy, if enabled.
Phone number (required only if sendOtp is true)

channelId.description: Channel ID (optional, uses header if not provided)

AuditInfo.description: Audit information containing creation and modification details

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the entity was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the entity was last updated

updatedBy.description: User who last updated the entity

MagicLinkListResponse.description: Response containing Magic Link factor information for list operations

accountId.description: Account ID associated with this Magic Link factor

enabled.description: Whether the Magic Link factor is enabled

locked.description: Whether the Magic Link factor is manually locked

lockedAuto.description: Whether the Magic Link factor is automatically locked due to failed attempts

unlockDate.description: Date and time when the factor will be automatically unlocked

identifier.description: List of identifiers (usernames, emails) for the account

channelName.description: Name of the channel this factor belongs to

channelId.description: UUID of the channel this factor belongs to

businessId.description: UUID of the business this account belongs to

businessName.description: Name of the business this account belongs to

emailAddress.description: Destination email address for sending the Magic Link. If omitted, account email is used.
Email address (required only if sendOtp is true)

channelId.description: Channel ID (optional, uses header if not provided)

OtpListResponse.description: Response containing OTP factor information for list operations

accountId.description: Account ID associated with this OTP factor

enabled.description: Whether the OTP factor is enabled

locked.description: Whether the OTP factor is manually locked

lockedAuto.description: Whether the OTP factor is automatically locked due to failed attempts

activationState.description: Semantic activation state for enrollment contracts

unlockDate.description: Date and time when the factor will be automatically unlocked

identifier.description: List of identifiers (usernames, emails) for the account

channelName.description: Name of the channel this factor belongs to

channelId.description: UUID of the channel this factor belongs to

businessId.description: UUID of the business this account belongs to

businessName.description: Name of the business this account belongs to

lastSuccessfulLogin.description: Timestamp of the last successful login using this OTP factor

accountType.description: Type of account associated with this OTP factor

enrolled.description: Whether the business/channel has at least one enrolled TOTP factor

SMSListResponse.description: Response containing SMS factor information for list operations

accountId.description: Account ID associated with this SMS factor

enabled.description: Whether the SMS factor is enabled

locked.description: Whether the SMS factor is manually locked

lockedAuto.description: Whether the SMS factor is automatically locked due to failed attempts

unlockDate.description: Date and time when the factor will be automatically unlocked

lastPhoneSent.description: Last phone number where SMS was sent

channelName.description: Name of the channel this factor belongs to

channelId.description: UUID of the channel this factor belongs to

businessId.description: UUID of the business this account belongs to

businessName.description: Name of the business this account belongs to

MagicLinkConsumeResponse.description: Response after consuming a Magic Link token

status.description: Status of the Magic Link transaction

factorId.description: Identifier of the Magic Link factor

callbackUrl.description: Configured callback URL for this Magic Link factor

redirectUrl.description: URL that the client should redirect the end-user to, including status and transaction id as query params

error.description: Optional error detail when the Magic Link could not be consumed

EmailListResponse.description: Response containing Email factor information for list operations

accountId.description: Account ID associated with this Email factor

enabled.description: Whether the Email factor is enabled

locked.description: Whether the Email factor is manually locked

lockedAuto.description: Whether the Email factor is automatically locked due to failed attempts

unlockDate.description: Date and time when the factor will be automatically unlocked

lastEmailAddressSent.description: Last email address where OTP was sent

channelName.description: Name of the channel this factor belongs to

magicLink.description: Magic Link factors for the account

FactorDetailsDto.description: Factor details containing common properties across all factor types

channelId.description: Channel ID associated with this factor

locked.description: Whether the factor is manually locked

lockedAuto.description: Whether the factor is automatically locked due to policy violations

unlockDate.description: Date and time when the factor will be unlocked (if locked)

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the factor was last updated

lastSuccessfulLogin.description: Date and time of the last successful login/validation

lastEmailAddressSent.description: Last email address used (for Email factors only)

lastPhoneNumberSent.description: Last phone number used (for SMS factors only)

expirationDaysToLive.description: Password expiration days to live (for Password factors only)

expirationStartTimeStamp.description: Password expiration start timestamp (for Password factors only)

locked.description: Whether the factor is manually locked

lockedAuto.description: Whether the factor is automatically locked due to failed attempts

unlockDate.description: Date and time when the factor will be automatically unlocked

lastSuccessfulLogin.description: Date and time of the last successful login

status.description: Status of the factor (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, DELETED)

fails.description: Map of failed authentication attempts with timestamps and failure reasons

channelId.description: UUID of the channel this factor belongs to

identifier.description: List of identifiers (usernames, emails) for the account

channelName.description: Name of the channel this factor belongs to
